content.content: Venezuelan interior designer, decorator, and event coordinator who was known primarily for creating brightly colored, extravagantly decorated Christmas trees and intricate floral arrangements. He frequently posted photos of his floral art on his self-titled Instagram page, where he had accumulated 600,000 followers. He died of sudden liver failure which led to brain death on October 24th, 2021. He began posting photos of his floral arrangements to his Instagram in October 2015. He gave his last masterclass on floral arranging and interior decorating on October 21st, 2021. JournalistMaría Celeste Arraráswas one of his clients. He was married to Juan Sebastián. He created floral arrangements for Venezuelan modelNorkys Batista.
